//: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for ADHTML wire attribute tokens (RFC-0021 / ADR-0007). The Swift command
//2: plugin `generate-wire-tokens` (Plugins/GenerateWireTokens) regenerates BOTH from this file:
//5: Run: `swift package --allow-writing-to-package-directory generate-wire-tokens`. Parity tests on both
//6: sides re-derive from this file, so a stale generated file fails CI. Generation lives on the Swift
//7: side, not in a JS script. Tokens are SINGLE base36 chars (the whole alphabet+numerals) — maximally
//8: dense; bare (no prefix) since no standard HTML attribute is single-char, and class/id/style keep
//9: their real names. Compound attrs append a suffix: on -> 'c:click', bind -> 'e:text'.
